mapper.insert: insert into noticefile( file_no, bo_no, file_name, file_size, file_fancysize, file_mime, file_savepath, file_downcount )values( seq_noticefile.nextval, #{boNo},#{fileName},#{fileSize},#{fileFancysize},#{fileMime}, #{fileSavepath},0 )
mapper.select: select n.bo_no, bo_title, bo_content, bo_writer, to_char(bo_date, 'yy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') bo_date, bo_hit, file_no, file_name, file_size, file_fancysize, file_mime, file_savepath, file_downcount from notice n left join noticefile nf on(n.bo_no = nf.bo_no) where n.bo_no = #{boNo}
select file_no, file_name, file_size, file_savepath from noticeFile where file_no = #{fileNo}
mapper.update: update noticefile set file_downcount = file_downcount+1 where file_no = #{fileNo}
update notice set bo_title = #{boTitle}, bo_content = #{boContent}, bo_date = sysdate where bo_no = #{boNo}
mapper.select: select file_savepath from noticefile where file_no = #{fileNo}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO LAW_DONG A USING (SELECT #{lawdCd} AS LAWD_CD FROM DUAL) B ON (A.LAWD_CD = B.LAWD_CD) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( LAWD_CD, SIDO_NM, SIGUNGU_NM, DONG_NM, RI_NM, USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{lawdCd}, #{sidoNm}, #{sigunguNm}, #{dongNm}, #{riNm}, #{useYn} )
mapper.select: SELECT LAWD_CD FROM LAW_DONG WHERE USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
MERGE INTO APT_COMPLEX A USING (SELECT #{aptId} AS APT_ID FROM DUAL) B ON (A.APT_ID = B.APT_ID)
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( APT_ID, APT_NAME, LAWD_CD, SIDO_NM, SIGUNGU_NM, DONG_NM, DETAIL_ADDR ) VALUES ( #{aptId}, #{aptName}, #{lawdCd}, #{sidoNm}, #{sigunguNm}, #{dongNm}, #{detailAddr} )
